title: Grocery Delivery E-Services Australia Pty Ltd (trading as HelloFresh) — Consumer harm
investigation_objective: The ACCC commenced Federal Court proceedings (around 16 December 2025) alleging Grocery Delivery E-Services Australia Pty Ltd, trading as HelloFresh, breached the Australian Consumer Law over subscription cancellation traps: 62,061 customers were allegedly charged between January 2023 and March 2025 despite cancelling before the advertised cut-off. The ACCC also alleges HelloFresh required payment details to view its menu while representing that consumers would not be charged unless meals were selected.
scope: Subject of Federal Court proceedings brought by the ACCC alleging misleading subscription cancellation representations, ongoing; Alleged that over 62,000 customers were charged despite cancelling before the advertised deadline
